Package com.hummeling.if97

Enum IF97.Quantity

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Enum<IF97.Quantity>
      • com.hummeling.if97.IF97.Quantity
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Comparable<IF97.Quantity>
    Enclosing class:
    IF97
    public static enum IF97.Quantity
extends Enum<IF97.Quantity>
    Quantities as defined by reference given above.

    • Enum Constant Summary

      Enum Constants 
      Enum Constant Description
      a
      Thermal diffusivity.
      alphav
      Isobaric cubic expansion coefficient.
      cp
      Specific isobaric heat capacity.
      cv
      Specific isochoric heat capacity.
      epsilon
      Dielectric constant.
      eta
      Dynamic viscosity.
      f
      Specific Helmholtz free energy.
      g
      Specific Gibbs free energy.
      gamma
      Isentropic exponent, or heat capacity ratio.
      h
      Specific enthalpy.
      kappa
      Thermal diffusivity.
      kappaT
      Isothermal compressibility.
      lambda
      Thermal conductivity.
      lambdaL
      Wavelength of light.
      n
      Refractive index.
      nu
      Kinematic viscosity.
      p
      Absolute pressure.
      Pr
      Prandtl number.
      rho
      Density.
      s
      Specific entropy.
      sigma
      Surface tension.
      T
      Temperature.
      u
      Specific internal energy.
      v
      Specific volume.
      w
      Speed of sound.
      x
      Vapour fraction.
      Z
      Compression factor or real-gas factor.

    • Method Detail

      • values

        public static IF97.Quantity[] values()
        Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared. This method may be used to iterate over the constants as follows: 
        for (IF97.Quantity c : IF97.Quantity.values())
    System.out.println(c);
        Returns:
        an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared

      • valueOf

        public static IF97.Quantity valueOf​(String name)
        Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this type. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
        Returns:
        the enum constant with the specified name
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - if this enum type has no constant with the specified name
        NullPointerException - if the argument is null

      • getPartialDerivatives

        public static Set<IF97.Quantity> getPartialDerivatives()
        Gets the quantities supported by partial derivatives relations.
        Returns:
        set of quantities
        See Also:
        IF97.partialDerivativePT(double, double, com.hummeling.if97.IF97.Quantity, com.hummeling.if97.IF97.Quantity, com.hummeling.if97.IF97.Quantity), IF97.partialDerivativeRhoT(double, double, com.hummeling.if97.IF97.Quantity, com.hummeling.if97.IF97.Quantity, com.hummeling.if97.IF97.Quantity)

      • getSymbol

        public String getSymbol()
        Gets the symbol for this quantity, according cited reference above.

        Unicode symbol
